name: Luscious Lemon Angel Food Cake
recipeIngredient: Cake flour (sifted, OR all purpose flour)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a very large mixing bowl, bring egg whites to room temperature.
2. Sift powdered sugar and cake flour together 3 times. Set aside.
3. Add cream of tartar and vanilla extract to the egg whites. Beat until soft peaks form.
4. Gradually add sugar, 2 tablespoons at a time, until soft peaks form.
5. Sift about one-fourth of the flour mixture into the egg white mixture, then gently fold in.
6. Repeat sifting and folding with the remaining flour mixture.
7. Gently fold in lemon peel.
8. Bake on the lowest rack in an oven preheated to 350°F (175°C) for 40-45 minutes or until the top springs back when lightly touched.
9. Immediately invert the cake onto a plate. Cool completely.
10. Using a narrow metal spatula, loosen the sides of the cake from the pan. Remove the cake from the pan.
11. Cut off the top 1-inch of the cake and set aside. With the knife held parallel to the side of the cake, cut around the hole in the center of the cake, leaving a 1-inch thickness of cake around the hole, then cut around inside the outer edge of the cake, leaving the outer cake wall 1 inch thick.
12. Using a spoon, remove the center of the cake, leaving a 1-inch-thick base. Place the hollowed-out cake on a serving plate.
13. Spoon filling into the hollowed section. Replace the top of the cake. Cover and chill for 4-24 hours before serving.
14. Sift powdered sugar over the cake, if desired, and garnish with lemon slices.
Lemon Cake Filling:
1. In a saucepan, stir together sugar, gelatin, and salt.
2. Gradually stir in cold water. Stir in lemon peel and lemon juice until the gelatin dissolves.
3. If desired, stir in a few drops of yellow food coloring. Heat and stir just until the gelatin dissolves.
4. Remove the mixture from the heat and cool it in an ice-water bath for 5-8 minutes or until it reaches the consistency of corn syrup.
5. Set aside. In a medium bowl, beat whipping cream until soft peaks form. Fold one-fourth of the whipped cream into the lemon gelatin mixture back into the remaining whipped cream. Chill for 5 minutes or until the mixture mounds when spooned. Makes 3 cups.
